mapper.select: SELECT w.station_id, s.name AS station_name, c.region, s.sort_index, w.biz_date, w.window_order, w.start_slot, w.end_slot, w.window_status FROM fc_adjustable_window w JOIN sa_station s ON s.id = w.station_id JOIN sa_company c ON c.id = s.company_id WHERE w.biz_date = #{bizDate} ORDER BY s.sort_index, w.window_order
